title: The Characters of Star Wars
content:
{{Top|rwm|ref}}
'''The Characters of Star Wars''' was a featurette in the [[2004]] release of the [[Original trilogy|''Star Wars'' Original Trilogy]], focusing on the following characters:
*[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]
*[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]]
*[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]
*[[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]]
*[[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]]
*[[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]]
*[[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]]
*[[Owen Lars/Legends|Owen Lars]]
*[[Beru Whitesun Lars/Legends|Beru Whitesun Lars]]
*[[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Wilhuff Tarkin]]
*[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]
*[[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]]

{{Media-stub}}
